nasb.text: For He did not subject to angels the world to come, concerning which we are speaking.

esv.text: For it was not to angels that God subjected the world to come, of which we are speaking.

cnv.text: 神並沒有把我們所說的“將來的世界”，交給天使管轄；

ccb.text: 上帝并没有把我们所谈论的未来世界交给天使掌管。

csbs.text: 事实上，我们所说的那“将要来的世界”，神并没有使它服从天使，
